privileged_info_summary: The task is a synthetic simulation where an agent replies to a customer support ticket in FreeScout (a real open-source helpdesk system). The target conversation subject is 'VPN Connection Dropping Intermittently' from customer Rachel Morrison (rachel.morrison@acmecorp.com). The agent must send a reply containing three required troubleshooting phrases: 'restart your network adapter', 'vpn2.acmecorp.com', and 'Clear Cache'. After replying, the conversation status must be changed to 'Pending' (status_id = 2). All test data is synthetically generated by setup scripts and does not represent real customer information.
